name: claudex-computer-use
description: Open-source background computer use for Claude and Codex on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Control Mac apps without stealing your mouse
interface.longDescription: Open Claudex Computer Use is an open-source, local-first Mac computer-use engine. It packages native macOS desktop control behind MCP so Claude, Codex, and other clients can drive apps in the background.
defaultPrompt: List the running apps I can target with Open Claudex Computer Use
Check whether Open Claudex Computer Use has the macOS permissions it needs
Click inside a target app without moving my visible cursor
